title: [BUG] Put the binary in a user directory, then expose it via a system-wide symlink will create many issues
summary: Install script places binary in $HOME/.fvm_flutter with system symlink in /usr/local/bin, violating industry standards and creating cross-user security risks, unnecessary sudo requirements, and fragile uninstall semantics
root_cause: Hybrid installation paradigm mixing per-user binary location with system-wide symlink - no major CLI tool uses this pattern
resolution_status: PR #967 open - implements user-local default install
